summary: Powerful Wellness is a health-coaching practice led by Dr. Melissa Lockhart, a nurse practitioner, serving women 35+ who are navigating midlife energy loss, unexplained weight gain, and hormonal shifts (perimenopause/menopause). It offers a free 15-minute discovery call, ongoing 1-on-1 coaching, a structured 6-week program across five health pillars (including medical/metabolic options like GLP-1, LIPOLEAN, and peptides), and digital products. Every paid offer is closed through a human discovery call, which the email program exists to book and protect.

campaigns.name: Discovery Call Booking, Reminders & No-Show Recovery
campaigns.objective: Maximize attended free 15-minute discovery calls and recover the ones that slip, since the call is the single revenue event the whole funnel drives toward.
campaigns.trigger: Discovery call booked (via Calendly or similar); upcoming-appointment timer; no-show event.
campaigns.segment: Anyone with a scheduled 15-minute discovery call with Dr. Lockhart.
campaigns.rationale: Powerful Wellness has no cart and no self-serve checkout — the free discovery call IS the conversion event, and reminders cut no-shows ~35%. This is the fastest, most measurable win and protects every dollar the rest of the funnel works to generate.

emails.purpose: Day-before reminder that also pre-sells the call — confirms the time, sets warm low-pressure expectations, and gets her to arrive with her #1 challenge in mind so 15 minutes goes further.
emails.subject: Your call with Dr. Lockhart is tomorrow — let's make these 15 minutes count
emails.preview: No pressure, no sales pitch — just a real first step for your energy and hormones.
keyPoints: Confirm the date/time with an add-to-calendar link, and a no-friction reschedule link so a conflict becomes a new time, not a no-show
Set expectations: 15 minutes, woman-to-woman, no pressure — you'll leave with one actionable step and a clear picture of what coaching looks like
Prompt her to jot down her biggest challenge — energy, weight, hormones, or sleep — so Dr. Lockhart can make the most of the call
Reassure on credibility and the #1 objection: this is an NP-led, clinical approach built for how a woman's body actually works after 35 — not another generic program

campaigns.name: Welcome & Onboarding (List Subscriber → Book the Call)
campaigns.objective: Get a new email subscriber to first value fast — booking the free 15-minute discovery call, which is the 'aha' moment for a lead.
campaigns.trigger: Email list signup / free-content opt-in. Send email 1 within seconds — welcome opens drop ~50% if delayed.
campaigns.segment: New list subscribers; branch on the optional intake question (biggest challenge: energy / weight / hormones / sleep) to lead with the right hook.
campaigns.rationale: The email list is the brand's primary owned asset and there's no branded onboarding today. The welcome email is the most-opened send a brand makes — the right moment to convert a fresh subscriber's intent into a booked call.

emails.purpose: Warm welcome that delivers an immediate sense of being understood and drives the single most important first action: booking the free 15-minute discovery call.
emails.subject: You've spent years caring for everyone else. Let's care for you now.
emails.preview: Your free 15-minute call with Dr. Lockhart is the fastest first step.
keyPoints: Open woman-to-woman: name the midlife reality — fatigue, weight that won't budge, hormones shifting — and that what worked before stopped working after 35
Position the free 15-minute discovery call as the no-pressure first step where she leaves with one actionable thing, framed around her stated challenge if known
Foreground the differentiator: Dr. Lockhart is a nurse practitioner — a clinical, personalized approach, not generic wellness advice
Set expectations for the next couple of weeks of short, useful emails, invite a real reply, and close with the brand's 'vibrant again, at every age' promise

campaigns.name: Lead-Magnet Nurture (Checklist → Discovery Call)
campaigns.objective: Move a passive checklist downloader toward booking the discovery call over a multi-week cycle by building trust and dismantling the core objection.
campaigns.trigger: Free checklist download ('important information before starting any health/fitness/nutrition program').
campaigns.segment: Checklist downloaders who haven't yet booked a call; branch by stated challenge (metabolic/GLP-1 interest vs. lifestyle-only vs. active peri/menopause).
campaigns.rationale: The checklist already pulls leads in, but nothing connects that download to a sales conversation. The hero send is the proof/evaluation email — it answers the exact objection ('will this work for someone my age?') that decides whether a skeptical midlife woman books.

emails.purpose: The evaluation-stage proof email: tackle the #1 objection head-on with peer social proof and the clinical, personalized approach, then offer the low-friction next step.
emails.subject: "Will this actually work for someone my age?" — fair question. Here's the honest answer.
emails.preview: Why a plan built for a post-35 body works when diets and the gym didn't.
keyPoints: Validate the skepticism — most clients tried diets and the gym and were let down — then explain why a post-35 body needs a different, hormone-aware approach
Show the clinical structure: an NP-led plan across the 5 Pillars (medical, fitness, nutrition, hormonal balance, community) personalized to her, not a template
Include outcomes-framed peer social proof from women in the same life stage (compliant: 'women who work with Dr. Lockhart report…', no diagnostic claims)
Permission-based close — 'when you're ready' — pointing to the free, no-pressure 15-minute call; include the medical-track health disclaimer in the footer

campaigns.name: Discovery Call → Coaching Conversion
campaigns.objective: Convert an attended free discovery call into an enrolled coaching client (6-week program, ongoing 1-on-1, or medical/metabolic track).
campaigns.trigger: Discovery call attended; branch by the track Dr. Lockhart recommended on the call (medical/GLP-1, 6-week program, or ongoing 1-on-1).
campaigns.segment: Prospects who completed a discovery call but haven't yet enrolled.
campaigns.rationale: Today nothing follows the call, so warm, pre-sold prospects go cold. The same-day recap-and-offer email captures peak intent — it restates her goal in her words and turns the conversation into a concrete, personalized enrollment path.

emails.purpose: Same-day post-call recap and offer — reflect back her goal, present the recommended plan as built-for-her, and make enrolling the easy next step while the conversation is fresh.
emails.subject: Your personalized next step after our call today
emails.preview: The plan we talked through — built for your body, not a generic template.
keyPoints: Recap her stated goal in her own words from the call (energy, weight, hormones) so it feels heard and specific to her
Lay out the recommended track and what's included — 6-week 5-Pillar reset, ongoing 1-on-1 with between-session messaging, or the medical/metabolic option (GLP-1/LIPOLEAN/peptides) if discussed
Reinforce trust with NP credibility and one relevant client outcome, framed compliantly; include the health disclaimer for the medical track
Make the next step low-friction and human — a single enroll/booking link plus 'just reply with any question, a real person reads every one'

campaigns.name: Win-Back / Re-Engagement
campaigns.objective: Reactivate dormant subscribers and past prospects who never booked, recover a slice of the list, and protect deliverability by surfacing who's still interested.
campaigns.trigger: Inactivity threshold — 60–90 days with no opens/clicks and never booked a call; separately, past clients who lapsed after the 6-week program.
campaigns.segment: Dormant subscribers and never-booked checklist leads; branch churned past clients into a separate 'what's changed since' message.
campaigns.rationale: A from-scratch list will accumulate non-bookers and lapsed contacts; win-back recovers 5–15% and cleans the list to protect sender reputation. The first 'did we lose you?' send is the highest-yield re-engagement touch.

emails.purpose: Warm 'we miss you' re-engagement — remind her of the core outcome she came for and offer the easiest possible re-entry, the free 15-minute call.
emails.subject: Still want your energy back?
emails.preview: It's not too late to feel vibrant again — here's a fresh place to start.
keyPoints: Lead with empathy, not guilt — life with everyone else's needs gets busy; the door to caring for herself is still open
Reconnect to the core outcome: reclaiming energy, balancing hormones, and feeling like a better version of herself after 35
Offer the lowest-friction re-entry — the free, no-pressure 15-minute discovery call — and hint at what's new since she last engaged
Keep it short with a single CTA and a real reply-to; set up the later sunset email by signaling we'll stop emailing if she's no longer interested
